text:
Pitakusu (ピタクス, Pitakusu) is a servant of Prince Tubeppa. Jump Ryu! Vol. 21 - Togashi's notes 

Trivia

Pitakusu's name, affiliation, and occupation were revealed in one of the characters sheets shown during Togashi's interview for Jump Ryu! Vol. 21.
